text:
Let's find something that works for you right now. I can help with:

🌬️  Box breathing — calm your nervous system in under 5 minutes
🧲  Grounding exercise — 5-4-3-2-1 to bring you back to the present
📝  Journaling prompts — help you put your thoughts into words
🧘  Body scan — release tension you didn't know you were holding

What sounds most helpful right now? Or just tell me how you're feeling and I'll suggest something.
